meta.title: .core — projects forge
meta.description: Personal portfolio site and collection point for all projects: DotSound, DotMathBot, and more.

hero.title: .core
hero.subtitle: A collection point for all projects under one umbrella. Each project has its own identity, mission, and repository. This site is a preview and navigator.

about.title: One person, many dots.
about.lede: A solo developer who builds each solution as 'one task — one repository', yet all of them live under a shared brand.

stack.title: What I work with every day.
stack.lede: Deep backend, lean frontend, plenty of DevOps, ML when needed.

projects.title: Dots in a constellation.
projects.lede: Each project is standalone, with its own repositories and domain. Click to see details.

contact.title: Drop a line.
contact.lede: If you want to discuss a joint project, hire, or just ask something — all channels below.
